name: Inzektor Axe - Zektahawk
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲虫装機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>インゼクター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>斧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ゼクトホーク
desc: Equip only to an "Inzektor" monster. It gains 1000 ATK. When the equipped monster declares an attack, your opponent cannot activate Spell/Trap Cards.
eff: Equip only to an "Inzektor" monster. It gains 1000 ATK. When the equipped monster declares an attack, your opponent cannot activate Spell/Trap Cards.

sets.set: Order of Chaos Sneak Peek Participation Card

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
